Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 1

Video.summary: Hibbs is tempted by a mobster's money when his wife needs surgery to save her eyesight.
Video.title: Who Do You Trust?

Video.summary: Hunter is asked to take the shocking case of a Vietnamese teenager who is accused of murdering a car salesman.
Video.title: Yesterday's Child

Video.summary: Hunter defies departmental policy to save McCall from a kidnapper and bring her back to the police force.
Video.title: The Legion, Part 2

Video.summary: Loyalties are tested when Hunter jeopardizes a case prosecuted by the Assistant DA, whom McCall loves.
Video.title: Presumed Guilty

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a ruthless Central American doctor who brutally tortured McCall's cleaning woman.
Video.title: The Nightmare

Video.summary: When the husband of a policewoman is murdered, Hunter and McCall suspect the woman's patrol partner.
Video.title: Partners

Video.summary: Hunter confronts the entire police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman.
Video.title: Honorable Profession

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a teenager who accidentally kills a drug dealer and flees with the money.
Video.title: Brotherly Love

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track down a departmental leak in the investigation of a serial killer and his victims.
Video.title: The Fifth Victim

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall cope with the double and triple-crossing of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: Mysterious recordings accusing a powerful company of dumping toxic waste seem like a prank, until the killings
Video.title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Image.alt: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Hunter's new trainee, the son of a career officer, has problems doing his duty while investigating murder.
Video.title: Shield Of Honor

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 2

Video.summary: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.
Video.title: No Good Deed

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.
Video.title: White Picket Fences

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ

Video.summary: The murder of a motivational speaker points to his competition as the guilty party.
Video.title: Peak Experience

Video.summary: Cassy investigates the death of a teenage boy she used to baby-sit.
Video.title: The Babysitter

Video.summary: The murder of a dead gym owner points to her wealthy fiancee and a former business pastner.
Video.title: Pumped Up

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy pursue a serial killer whose victims are culled from the Internet.
Video.title: callme@murder.com

Video.summary: After a former partner she accused of corruption is killed, Cassy suspects his involvement in the theft of $10 million.
Video.title: Exit The Dragon

Video.summary: As a pair of wealthy brothers elaborate plan to inherit their disabled mother's fortune go awry, a disgruntled alcoholic police sergeant takes a contract out on Harry's life.
Video.title: Pink Elephants
